Man, GMX has some real slot machine combo routing, but the biggest problem is Noma. Her on field effect is absolutely insane, especially since she can summon a 4-5 dino COMPREX with ease, but pure GMX genuinely has no way to summon her with any consistency. The only answer I could come up with was sending her to grave with Mitsurugi Ritual, then reviving her off whatever loose revive is left. So you've got ALLOS, Kimridge stack > VELOX, Cross Sheep, Charmer Quartet, and Selandea to somehow get her onto the field.

GMX bridges into Mitsurugi with Archosaur (pop ALLOS/VELOX), and Mitsurugi bridges into GMX with Zombie Vampire. 12 GMX-sided starters, 4 Mitsurugi-sided ones, so consistency's actually ok, but sadly there's only enough space for 12 non-engine. Could maybe argue for cutting the GMX Trap, quickplay, or both - the routing frequently won't let you search either of them.

Turbo Obelisk into the grave and pound with The Breaking-Ruined God. you do this by turboing into "Branded Fusion", dumping Fallen of Albaz + Obelisk to fuse into Brigrand. Mitsurugi is to bait hand-traps and/or win-more with consistent board presence. Also when tributed for Obelisk and by Obelisk's effect, they trigger Mitsurugi's effects. Other win-more are Soul Energy Maxx!!, you can dump it into the grave to use it's graveyard effect for offense on your turn, or for defense on oppotnents turn (if you have enough tributes to do so). It's a one-trick pony, weak to hand-traps/distruptions, but Mitsurugi is to help you have some presence with Branded for board-breaking. Ecclesia is not in the main deck, but can be included if you want to make Dogma into a tower.  

If going second, you can add in 2 Droll, 1 Super Poly, 3 Fuwalos in exchage/take out: 1 Aramasa, 2 Prayers, 1 Kitt, 1 Cartesia, 1 Mercourier

deck_excerpt: The closest to pure any HERO sub-archetype can be in 2026
deck_description: Based on lists by Jaden BR YT and Metricz. I think the new support makes Destiny HERO better than the omni HERO pile. Fusion Destiny and Doom Liege are both 1CCs and you can easily end with Chaos, Dark Law, Dusktopia, and Death Dogma. DPE is as good as ever with these other interactions backing it. Dreadnought can also OTK out of nowhere. No Plasma even though it's incredibly easy to access with D - Force because the ceiling is fairly high already, we don't need two more one-ofs.

deck_excerpt: Ashened and Dinomorphia come together with some power and using your opponents monsters as fusion material because sharing is caring :)
deck_description:
Ashened with Dinomorphia to bully your opponents field zone and get free special summons off Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction by activating it to you opponents field zone. Then you can use the Dinomorphia cards to get even more summons off on your opponents turn, because Sharing is caring :) Full Combo write up to come soon but for now the basics are as follows:

If Veidos and Obsidim are not in hand. 

  1. Priestess of the Ashened City ----> Search Inferno of the Ashened 
  2. Activate Inferno of the Ashened placing Obsidim, the Ashened City into your opponents field zone 
  3. With Obsidim, the Ashened City now in play you can Special Summon any of the Ashened cards that are in your hand 
  4. Because most of the Ashened cards are level 4 your can XYZ Summon into Infernal Flame Banshee to search Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction 
  5. Use Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction effect to destroy Obsidim, the Ashened City in your opponents field then set Ashened to Endlessness from deck
  6. Use Obsidim, the Ashened City destroy effect to special summon King of the Ashened City 
  7. Activate King of the Ashened City to special summon any Ashened from the deck since your opponent controls a monster with 2800 ATK Hero of the Ashened City is a solid choice but if you have room or need the removal Spearhead of the Ashened City can XYZ summon into Evilswarm Exciton Knight, Tornado Dragon or Number 60: Dugares the Timeless 
  8. Use Ashened to Endlessness during opponents Main phase to fuse away Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction and all your Pryo monsters you control to make Veidos the Dragon of Endless Darkness which will give you at minimum a 4500 ATK Veidos the Dragon of Endless Darkness which can not be destroyed by card effects and can not be targeted by monster effects
